requirement_topic.en: Battery cell and module safety — IEC 62619 certification
requirement_topic.zh: 电池电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619认证
requirement_topic.zht: 電池電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619認證

summary.en: BSJ-oriented conformity assessment for BESS components in Jamaica expects safety evidence for lithium cells and modules consistent with IEC 62619:2022 requirements. In practice this requirement is applied before or alongside OUR/JPS project review, especially for industrial and utility-scale sites.
summary.zh: 牙买加基于BSJ导向的BESS组件合格评定，通常要求电芯与模组符合IEC 62619:2022安全要求。该要求在实际操作中通常在或并行于OUR/JPS项目审查之前进行。
summary.zht: 牙買加基於BSJ導向的BESS組件合格評定，通常要求電芯與模組符合IEC 62619:2022安全要求。該要求在實務上通常在或並行於OUR/JPS項目審查之前進行。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 (Safety requirements — secondary lithium cells and batteries for industrial applications)
IEC 62620:2014 (Secondary cells and batteries — industrial applications — designation system)

summary.en: China requires GB 38031 and GB/T 36276 pathways for different BESS and traction safety domains. These standards are often strong for production quality, but they are not automatically accepted as direct substitutes for IEC 62619 in Jamaican BSJ process.
summary.zh: 中国对不同场景采用GB 38031与GB/T 36276体系管理安全，但这些标准主要保障国内制造质量体系，并不自动替代牙买加BSJ流程中的IEC 62619直接要求。
summary.zht: 中國對不同場景採用GB 38031與GB/T 36276體系管理安全，但這些標準主要保障國內製造質量體系，並不自動替代牙買加BSJ流程中的IEC 62619直接要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 38031-2020 (Electric vehicles — safety requirements for traction battery)
GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage)

gap.en: GB 38031 and GB/T 36276 are not treated as equivalent in many Jamaica-facing submissions. Exporters should add IEC 62619-aligned test and certification evidence for the exact BESS chemistry, form factor, and thermal management design supplied to the project.
gap.zh: 许多面向牙买加的提交中，GB 38031与GB/T 36276不被视为等效。出口商应补充与实际供货化学体系、形态与热管理设计完全一致的IEC 62619对标测试和认证证据。
gap.zht: 許多面向牙買加的提交中，GB 38031與GB/T 36276不被視為等效。出口商應補充與實際供貨化學體系、形態與熱管理設計完全一致的IEC 62619對標測試和認證證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where BSJ-style conformity evidence is requested
mandatory_status.cn: GB 38031 / GB/T 36276 mandatory domestically; not equivalent to IEC 62619 for Jamaica filing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619 test evidence from an internationally accepted body is the practical path for BSJ-facing conformity review. If IEC 62619 is not already in the product file, the certification schedule should be integrated early into the project plan before JPS/OUR scheduling.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 具备IEC 62619测试证据并经认可机构出具，是应对BSJ导向合格评定的可执行路径。若产品文件尚未含有IEC 62619证书，应将认证进度提前纳入项目计划，再对接JPS/OUR时程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 具備IEC 62619測試證據並經認可機構出具，是應對BSJ導向合格評定的可執行路徑。若產品文件尚未含有IEC 62619證書，應將認證進度提前納入項目計劃，再對接JPS/OUR時程。

requirement_topic.en: Second-life and refurbished cells — IEC 63056 requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 二次利用与翻新电芯——IEC 63056要求
requirement_topic.zht: 二次利用與翻新電芯——IEC 63056要求

summary.en: When exporting second-life or repurposed lithium cells to Jamaica, project teams generally apply stricter traceability and safety checks. IEC 63056:2020 is referenced as the relevant framework for second-life safety evidence and battery-origin disclosure.
summary.zh: 向牙买加出口二次利用或改用途锂电芯时，项目团队通常要求更严格的可追溯性和安全审查。IEC 63056:2020常被用作二次利用安全证据和电芯来源披露的参考框架。
summary.zht: 向牙買加出口二次利用或改用途鋰電芯時，項目團隊通常要求更嚴格的可追溯性和安全審查。IEC 63056:2020常被用作二次利用安全證據和電芯來源披露的參考框架。

standards_or_laws: IEC 63056:2020 (Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in second-life applications)

summary.en: China has internal practices for remanufactured battery quality grading, and EV battery reuse guidance exists through GB/T 34015 series, but there is no widely accepted national equivalence path to IEC 63056 for utility BESS applications.
summary.zh: 中国对翻新电池有内部质量分级实践，二手电动车电池梯次利用有GB/T 34015系列指引，但在公用储能应用中并无广泛接受的国家标准等价IEC 63056路径。
summary.zht: 中國對翻新電池有內部質量分級實踐，二手電動車電池梯次利用有GB/T 34015系列指引，但在公用儲能應用中並無廣泛接受的國家標準等價IEC 63056路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34015-2017 (Retired EV battery echelon utilisation — residual energy test method)
GB/T 34015.2-2020 (Echelon utilisation — grading requirements and test methods)

gap.en: No automatic substitution is typically accepted in Jamaica-facing BESS submissions for second-life cells. If reused cells are supplied, the project dossier should include IEC 63056-aligned safety documentation and a full origin disclosure package.
gap.zh: 在面向牙买加的BESS提交中，二次利用电芯通常没有自动等效路径。若供应二次利用电芯，项目资料需包含IEC 63056一致的安全文件和完整来源披露包。
gap.zht: 在面向牙買加的BESS提交中，二次利用電芯通常沒有自動等效路徑。若供應二次利用電芯，項目資料需包含IEC 63056一致的安全文件和完整來源披露包。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when second-life cells are used in Jamaica projects
mandatory_status.cn: No formal GB-equivalent for whole BESS second-life compliance pathway

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Exporting reused cells into Jamaica without IEC 63056-level evidence is commonly delayed in project review. Manufacturers can reduce review friction by sourcing new cells under IEC 62619 where possible, or by adding a full IEC 63056-compliant evidence pack for second-life lines.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 缺少IEC 63056级别证据的二次利用电芯在牙买加项目审查中常被延迟。制造商可通过优先采用IEC 62619新电芯降低审查阻力，或为二次利用线路补充完整IEC 63056合规证据包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 缺少IEC 63056級別證據的二次利用電芯在牙買加項目審查中常被延遲。製造商可透過優先採用IEC 62619新電芯降低審查阻力，或為二次利用線路補充完整IEC 63056合規證據包。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical installation safety — BSJ and utility-aligned installation compliance
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安装安全——BSJ与公用事业对接安装合规
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安裝安全——BSJ與公用事業對接安裝合規

summary.en: Electrical installation review in Jamaica references BSJ-referenced electrical safety frameworks and utility-side connection assumptions similar to IEC 60364 family principles. Local site acceptance with JPS interfaces generally expects wiring, protection, and earthing design adjusted to local voltage and installation class.
summary.zh: 牙买加电气安装审查以BSJ参考电气安全框架并结合公用事业并网接口假设开展，原则上接近IEC 60364体系。与JPS接口的现场验收通常要求布线、保护与接地方案按本地电压和安装等级进行调整。
summary.zht: 牙買加電氣安裝審查以BSJ參考電氣安全框架並結合公用事業併網接口假設開展，原則上接近IEC 60364體系。與JPS接口的現場驗收通常要求佈線、保護與接地方案按本地電壓和安裝等級進行調整。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62477-1:2022 (Safety requirements for power electronic converter systems)

summary.en: China uses GB 50054 and GB/T 51048 as core low-voltage and storage-station electrical installation references. They are structured around China’s domestic voltage architecture and utility norms. Documentation cannot be directly reused without local electrical adaptation and review.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 50054与GB/T 51048作为低压和储能电站电气安装核心参考标准，围绕国内电压体系和电力行业惯例组织。文件不能在无本地调整和复核的情况下直接复用。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 50054與GB/T 51048作為低壓和儲能電站電氣安裝核心參考標準，圍繞國內電壓體系和電力行業慣例組織。文件不能在無本地調整和複核的情況下直接複用。

standards_or_laws: GB 50054-2011 (Code for design of low voltage power distribution)
GB/T 51048-2014 (Code for design of electrochemical energy storage station)

gap.en: Chinese installation design packages centered on GB references do not close Jamaica’s project review loop where BSJ/OUR/JPS workflows expect local adaptation. Installation drawings, earthing calculations, and protective device coordination must be redrafted where needed.
gap.zh: 以GB标准为核心的中国安装设计文件不能直接闭合牙买加BSJ/OUR/JPS流程需求。安装图纸、接地计算和保护定值协调需按本地场景重制或更新。
gap.zht: 以GB標準為核心的中國安裝設計文件不能直接閉合牙買加BSJ/OUR/JPS流程需求。安裝圖紙、接地計算和保護定值協調需按本地場景重製或更新。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for site acceptance and utility interconnection safety review
mandatory_status.cn: GB 50054 / GB/T 51048 mandatory domestically; not equivalent for Jamaica review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BESS electrical design submissions to Jamaica-facing projects should be rebuilt with Jamaica voltage assumptions and local interconnection coordination constraints before submission to BSJ and utility-side reviewers. Generic Chinese installation packages are useful for design inputs but are not sufficient by themselves.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向牙买加项目的BESS电气设计文件应在提交BSJ和公用事业评审前，按牙买加电压假设和本地并网协调约束重建。通用中国安装文件可作为输入，但不能单独满足要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向牙買加項目的BESS電氣設計文件應在提交BSJ和公用事業評審前，按牙買加電壓假設和本地併網協調約束重建。通用中國安裝文件可作為輸入，但不能單獨滿足要求。
